title: Velvety Portuguese Corn Stir-fry
description: A weeknight portuguese dish featuring corn arepa filled with mozzarella cheese, poached in a savory sauce, sugar-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Mozzarella Cheese
ingredients.notes: Sugar-free, low-fat or lactose-free if needed.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add corn starch and water, whisk until smooth. Stir into broth.
Stir in soy sauce, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to taste. Bring to a simmer.
Cut corn arepas into halves or quarters. Place half of the mozzarella cheese inside each.
Gently poach the filled arepas for about 2-3 minutes until cheese is melted and slightly golden.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
